name: East Africa Fintech Payloads
description: Specialized fuzzing vectors for Airtel Money, MTN MoMo, and USSD APIs in the Uganda ecosystem.

MTN MoMo API.name: X-Reference-Id Collision
MTN MoMo API.description: Attempt to reuse a known transaction UUID to bypass payment gates.

MTN MoMo API.name: Amount Negative Value
MTN MoMo API.description: Test for negative transaction amount handling.

MTN MoMo API.name: Amount Zero Value
MTN MoMo API.description: Test for zero transaction amount handling.

Airtel Money.name: PIN Bypass via Truncation
Airtel Money.description: Truncate the PIN payload or pass null to bypass authentication.

Airtel Money.name: Over-length MSISDN
Airtel Money.description: Send MSISDN longer than the allowed Airtel format (12 digits) to test for buffer/DB crashes.

USSD Gateway Injection.name: Base USSD Code Execution (*165#)
USSD Gateway Injection.description: Inject a raw USSD shortcode into an input field expecting a phone number to trigger gateway misconfiguration.

USSD Gateway Injection.name: USSD URL Encoding
USSD Gateway Injection.description: URL-encoded version of a USSD string.

USSD Gateway Injection.name: Command Injection via USSD
USSD Gateway Injection.description: Combine Unix command injection with a USSD payload.

Sacco JWT Manipulation.name: None Algorithm
Sacco JWT Manipulation.description: Change JWT alg to 'none' and strip the signature.

Sacco JWT Manipulation.name: Role Escalation (Admin)
Sacco JWT Manipulation.description: Standard base64 encoded payload with role set to admin.
